_meta.source_of_truth: DESIGN.md (prose is authoritative; this file is its machine-readable mirror, versioned like contracts/openapi.v0.json)
_meta.verified_by: tools/token-lint — manifest values MUST equal DESIGN.md's Color / Type Scale / Brand Delta tables; platform layers (ios DesignKit/Tokens.swift, android designkit/Tokens.kt) MUST equal this manifest value-for-value; brand-delta keys MUST equal brands/*.json
_meta.dark_mode_note: Choco dark palette is carried from the start per DR-6.3 but rendered NOWHERE until its G3 slice; apps force light mode at S7.

iconography.seam: one Iconography layer per platform; call sites never use glyph literals; FA Pro is an asset swap behind this seam (bundled fallback set ships when the Pro kit is absent — Correction 2)

brand_delta._note: These keys MUST equal brands/*.json brand_primary / brand_celebration (token-lint check c). The delta is a token-namespace swap only; everything else is shared (DESIGN.md 'same sticker, different ink').

laws.1_foil_never_ranks_people: Foil/patina/rarity apply to moments, crews, authored cards — never a person's card.
laws.2_danger_out_of_playful: No danger token reachable from playful-register components; playful errors use the one generic could-not-send pattern in neutral styling.
laws.3_absence_not_disablement: No locked/grayed/disabled decorative variant exists in the kit (type-level). Sole allowlisted exception: the create-crew Premium secondary CTA in the Crews empty state.
laws.4_one_limit_reached_surface: Freemium caps and reputation-scaled caps render identically (limit_reached.generic).
laws.5_lock_screen_privacy: Notifications render in neutral register with Con-Mode content rules (S4 obligation; nothing to render at S7).
laws.6_time_only_adds_value: No decay / expiry-shame / streak-loss token exists.

allowlisted_exceptions.create_crew_premium_cta: the single ratified law-3 exception; Crews empty-state secondary CTA
